_doc: Spawned by BuildSystem when the Worker Pad ghost zone (tag 'worker_pad') completes. Tiny anchor entity that holds (a) a Stockpile component the workers deposit/withdraw from, and (b) an OnSpawn list that fires once on the next frame to create the 3 worker children at offsets around the anchor. PR #3.1 swapped in the real archetypes (wood-worker / essence-collector / worker-builder); PR #3.2/#3.3 add their AI.
